category_title: Students with internalizing behaviors and low self-confidence
scenario_title: Reluctance to participate in a group board game
minimal_context: The student is prompted to join peers in playing a board game focused on moving around the alphabet based on animal names.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We are going to play a group board game now where we move around the alphabet based on animal names.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Hesitates a bit) I don't want to play.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please come over to the board and join the group.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time to start the game with everyone.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Remains completely unwilling to participate in the group game, withdrawing from the others) I'm not doing it.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: We are going to play a group board game now where we move around the alphabet based on animal names.

STUDENT: (Hesitates a bit) I don't want to play.

TUTOR: Please come over to the board and join the group.

STUDENT: (Shakes head and steps back) No.

TUTOR: It is time to start the game with everyone.

STUDENT: (Remains completely unwilling to participate in the group game, withdrawing from the others) I'm not doing it.

task.content: Playing a board game focused on moving around the alphabet based on animal names

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When asked to participate in a group game
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Initially unwilling to participate in a group game
